title: SVGR
subtitle: Convert raster images to scalable vector graphics
description: Ideal for converting AI-generated logos. Since all logo generators create raster files, scaling and editing become difficult. SVGR converts them to vector format, giving designers a starting point to fine-tune — even if the result isn't pixel-perfect.

useCases.title: Why Use SVGR?
useCases.subtitle: SVGR converts raster images (PNG, JPG) into scalable vector graphics (SVG) — saving you time and money.

aiLogos.title: Convert AI-Generated Logos to Vector
aiLogos.description: Every AI logo generator creates raster images (PNG/JPG). These images lose quality when scaled, look blurry on large displays, and can't be cleanly edited in vector design tools. To use an AI-generated logo professionally — on business cards, banners, merchandise, or websites — you need a vector version.
aiLogos.problemDescription: AI logo generators only output raster files. Raster images are not scalable, not suitable for high-resolution printing, and difficult to edit. Hiring a graphic designer to manually recreate the logo as a vector costs money and takes time.
aiLogos.solutionDescription: SVGR converts your AI-generated logo into an SVG file instantly. Even for complex designs, SVGR creates a solid first draft that significantly reduces manual work — giving designers a clean starting point to fine-tune rather than starting from scratch.

looka.name: Looka
looka.description: AI-powered logo maker with brand kit. Generates logos, business cards, and social media assets — all in raster format.

brandmark.name: Brandmark
brandmark.description: AI logo design tool that creates unique logos from keywords. Outputs PNG and JPG files that need vectorization for print use.

hatchful.name: Hatchful by Shopify
hatchful.description: Free logo maker from Shopify. Quick and easy, but only exports raster images — not ideal for scaling or professional printing.

logoai.name: LogoAI
logoai.description: AI-driven logo generator with brand identity packages. Produces high-quality raster logos that still need conversion for vector workflows.

designsai.name: Designs.ai
designsai.description: AI design suite covering logos, videos, and mockups. Logo output is raster-based, requiring vectorization for scalable use.

tailorbrands.name: Tailor Brands
tailorbrands.description: AI branding platform for logos and marketing materials. Generates raster logos that can't be scaled without quality loss.

turbologo.name: Turbologo
turbologo.description: Online logo maker with AI-generated design options. Exports raster files — converting to SVG ensures your logo stays crisp at any size.

logocom.name: Logo.com
logocom.description: AI logo generator with a simple interface. Creates professional-looking logos in PNG format, which need vectorization for print and large-format use.

legacyAssets.title: Modernize Legacy Image Assets
legacyAssets.description: Many organizations have older image assets — logos, icons, diagrams, and illustrations — stored only as raster files. These assets may have been created years ago when vector tools were less accessible, or the original source files have been lost over time.
legacyAssets.problemDescription: Legacy raster images degrade when resized, look pixelated on modern high-DPI screens, and can't be easily edited or recolored. Recreating them from scratch is time-consuming and expensive.
legacyAssets.solutionDescription: SVGR lets you batch-convert old raster assets into clean SVG files. The result is a scalable, editable vector that works perfectly on any screen size — from mobile devices to 4K displays and print.
